2606.06388.title: Humans' ALMANAC: A Human Collaboration Dataset of Action-Level Mental Model Annotations for Agent Collaboration
2606.06388.paper_summary: Recent advances in LLM agents have enabled complex cognitive capabilities, such as multi-step reasoning, planning, and tool use, that increasingly position these agents as human collaborators. Effective collaboration, however, requires collaborators to continuously maintain and align mental models of their own reasoning,partners' intentions, and shared goals during the collaborative process. Today's agents rarely develop such capabilities since they are primarily optimized for task completion, and the community lacks authentic human collaboration data with action-level mental model annotations that could guide agents toward process-level collaborative competence. To bridge this gap, we present ALMANAC, a dataset of Action-Level Mental model ANnotations for Agent Collaboration built from the Map Task, a classic dyadic routing task from social science. ALMANAC contains 2,987 collaboration actions, each paired with theory-informed mental model annotations that record the participants' self-reasoning, perceived partner intent, and perceived team goal. We benchmark six LLMs on predicting humans' next-turn behavior and mental models. Our results demonstrate ALMANAC's utility in evaluating models' ability to simulate human collaborative behaviors and infer their underlying mental models.
2606.06388.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型（LLM）代理方面的進展使得複雜的認知能力得以實現，例如多步推理、規劃和工具使用，這些能力使這些代理越來越像人類合作者。然而，有效的合作要求合作者在合作過程中持續維持和對齊他們自己推理的心理模型、夥伴的意圖和共同目標。當今的代理很少發展出這樣的能力，因為它們主要是為了完成任務而優化的，而社群缺乏真實的人類合作數據，這些數據應該包含行動層面的心理模型註釋，以指導代理朝向過程層面的合作能力。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了ALMANAC，一個基於地圖任務的代理合作行動層心理模型註釋數據集，這是一個來自社會科學的經典雙人路由任務。ALMANAC包含2,987個合作行動，每個行動都配有理論指導的心理模型註釋，記錄參與者的自我推理、感知的夥伴意圖和感知的團隊目標。我們對六個LLM進行了基準測試，以預測人類的下一步行為和心理模型。我們的結果顯示ALMANAC在評估模型模擬人類合作行為和推斷其潛在心理模型的能力方面的實用性。
2606.06388.author: Jiaju Chen et.al.
2606.06388.authors: Jiaju Chen, Yuxuan Lu, Jiayi Su, Chaoran Chen, Songlin Xiao, Zheng Zhang, Yun Wang, Yunyao Li, Jian Zhao, Tongshuang Wu, Toby Jia-Jun Li, Dakuo Wang, Bingsheng Yao
